terms.heading: Tearmai Seirbhise
terms.subtitle: Na rialacha agus na treoirlinte chun ar n-ardan a usaid
terms.welcome_body_1: Tri rochtain a fhail ar ar n-ardan no e a usaid, aontaionn tu a bheith faoi cheangal ag na Tearmai Seirbhise seo. Leigh go curamach iad le do thoil sula nglacann tu pairt inar bpobal.
terms.welcome_body_2_before: Bunaionn na tearmai seo creat do
terms.welcome_body_2_after: idir baill an phobail. Is e ar gcuspoir timpeallacht iontaofa a chruthu ina mbeidh am gach duine comhluachmhar.
terms.section1_intro_before: Oibrionn ar n-ardan ar phrionsabal simpli ach cumhachtach:
terms.credits_no_monetary_value: Nil aon luach airgeadais ag Creidmheasanna Ama agus ni feidir iad a mhalairtu ar airgead tirim. Nil siad ann ach chun malartuithe pobail a eascaiu.
terms.credit_rule_1: Is ionann uair amhain de sheirbhis agus Creidmheas Ama amhain tuillte
terms.credit_rule_2: Is feidir creidmheasanna a usaid chun seirbhisi a fhail o bhaill eile
terms.credit_rule_3: Ni chuireann cineall na seirbhise isteach ar luach an chreidmheasa
terms.credit_rule_4: Deantar creidmheasanna a rianaithe go huathoibrioch trid an ardan
terms.section2_intro: Nuair a chruthaionn tu cuntas, aontaionn tu le:
terms.account_accurate_desc: Caithfidh do phroifil d'fhiorainm agus do scileanna a leiriiu
terms.account_security_desc: Coinnigh do chuid dintiuir logala faoi run agus slanailte
terms.account_one_account_desc: Ni cheadaitear ach cuntas gniomhach amhain in aghaidh an duine
terms.account_current_desc: Nuashonraigh do phroifil nuair a athraionn do scileanna no d'infhaighteacht
terms.account_reachable_desc: Freagair teachtaireachtai agus iarratais go traithiuil
terms.guideline_respect_label: Caith le gach duine le meas
terms.guideline_respect_desc: Bi cinealra agus curtiseach i ngach idirghniomhaiocht
terms.guideline_honour_desc: Ma aontaionn tu le malairtu, lean ar aghaidh leis
terms.guideline_communicate_desc: Coinnigh baill eile ar an eolas faoi d'infhaighteacht
terms.guideline_inclusive_desc: Failte roimh bhaill o gach culair agus cumais
terms.guideline_feedback_desc: Cuidigh leis an bpobal tri leirmheasanna cothroma a sholathar
terms.section4_intro: Ta na gniomhaiochtai seo a leanas coiscthe go dian agus d'fheadfadh foirceannadh cuntais a bheith mar thoradh orthu:
terms.prohibited_sharing_private: Faisneais phriobhaideach daoine eile a roinnt
terms.section5_intro: Ta do shabhailteacht tabhachtach. Molaimid na treoirlinte seo a leanaint:
terms.safety_first_meetings_desc: Buail le cheile in aiteanna poibli le haghaidh na gcead mhalartuithe
terms.safety_verify_desc: Deimhnigh proifil an bhaill roimh bhuaileadh le cheile
terms.safety_instincts_desc: Ma bhraitheann tu go bhfuil rud eigin micheart, na lean ar aghaidh
terms.safety_report_desc: Cuir in iul duinn faoi aon iompar amhrasach
terms.section6_intro: Solathaironn {{name}} ardan do bhaill an phobail chun ceangal a dheanamh agus seirbhisi a mhalairtu. Mar sin fein:
terms.liability_no_guarantee: Ni rathaimid cailiocht na sabhailteacht aon seirbhisi a mhalairtiodh
terms.liability_no_disputes: Nilimid freagrach as diospoidi idir baill
terms.liability_own_risk: Malairtionn baill seirbhisi ar a bpriacal fein
terms.liability_insurance: Molaimid arachas cuio a fhail le haghaidh seirbhisi gairmiula
terms.liability_hold_harmless: Tri usaid a bhaint as an ardan, aontaionn tu {{name}} a choinneail neamhdhiobhailte o aon eilithe a eascraionn as do rannphairtiocht i malartuithe seirbhise.
terms.section7_intro: Coinniomid an ceart chun cuntais a chur ar fionrai no a fhoirceannadh a sharitionn na tearmai seo. Cuiseanna le foirceannadh:
terms.termination_self_close: Is feidir leat do chuntas a dhunadh freisin ag am ar bith tri do shocruithe cuntais.
terms.section8_intro: Is feidir linn na tearmai seo a nuashonriu o am go ham chun athrutie inar gcleachtais a leiriiu no ar chuiseanna dli. Nuair a dheanaimid athrutie suntasacha:
terms.changes_notify: Cuirfimid ar an eolas tu tri riomhphost no fogra ardain
terms.changes_date_shown: Taispeanaifear an data nuashonraithe ag barr an leathanaigh seo
terms.changes_continued_use: Is ionann usaid leanunach an ardain agus glacadh leis na tearmai nua
terms.cta_body: Ma ta aon cheisteanna agat faoi na Tearmai Seirbhise seo no ma theastaionn soileiriu ar aon phointai uait, ta ar bhfoireann anseo chun cabhru leat.

privacy.heading: Polasai Priobhaideachta
privacy.subtitle: Conas a bhailimid, a usaidimid agus a chosnaomid do chuid faisneise pearsanta
privacy.commitment_body_1: Ta {{name}} tiomanta do do phriobhaideacht a chosaint agus a chinntiiu go laimitear do shonrai pearsanta go freagrach. Miniionn an polasai seo cen faisneais a bhailimid, cen fath a mbailimid e, agus conas is feidir leat do shonrai a bhainistiu.
privacy.commitment_body_2_after: Ta se de cheart agat a thuiscint agus a bhainistiu conas a usaidtear do chuid faisneise.
privacy.data_collection_intro: Ni bhailimid ach an faisneais ata riachtanach chun ar seirbhisi a sholathar agus a fheabhsu:
privacy.data_account_why: Riachtanach chun do chuntas a chruthu agus a bhainistiu
privacy.data_profile_why: Cuidionn se ceangal a dheanamh le baill an phobail
privacy.data_device_collected: Cineall brosalai, seoladh IP, cineall gleo
privacy.data_analytics_collected: Leathanaigh a tugadh cuairt orthu, gneith a usaideadh, fad an tseisiuin
privacy.data_usage_intro: Usaidtear do shonrai go heisiach chun na gcrioch seo a leanas:
privacy.usage_delivery_desc: Malartuithe ama agus naisc phobail a eascaiu
privacy.usage_communication_desc: Nuashonruithe, fograi agus teachtaireachtai tabhachtacha o bhaill eile a sheoladh
privacy.usage_security_desc: Do chuntas a chosaint agus calaois no mi-usaid a chosc
privacy.usage_improvement_desc: Patruin usaide a anailisiu chun gneith an ardain a fheabhsu
privacy.usage_legal_desc: Ceanglais rialachan a chomhlioniacht nuair is ga
privacy.no_sell_data: Ni dhiolaimid do shonrai pearsanta le triiiu pairtiihe. Ni roinnfear do chuid faisneise le fograioiri na brocalai sonrai riamh.
privacy.visibility_body_1: Ta do phroifil infheicthe do bhaill fhiordheimhnithe eile de phobal an bhainc ama. Ta an infheictheacht seo riachtanach chun malartuithe a eascaiu agus muinin a thogail laistigh den phobal.
privacy.visibility_body_2_before: Is feidir leat rialu cen faisneais a thaispeaantar ar do phroifil tri do
privacy.visibility_body_2_after: Ta faisneais eigin, cosul le d'ainm agus do shuiomh ginearalta, riachtanach le haghaidh rannphairtiocht fhiuntach sa phobal.
privacy.protection_intro: Cuirimid bearta slandala daingne i bhfeidhm chun do chuid faisneise a chosaint:
privacy.protect_encryption_desc: Sonrai uile crioptaithe le linn tarchurtha (HTTPS) agus agus iad ina luioche
privacy.protect_passwords_desc: Focail faire hashaithe ag usaid algoirtimi caighdean tionscail
privacy.protect_access_desc: Polasaithe inmheanacha diana a chuireann teorainn le rochtain ar shonrai
privacy.rights_intro: Faoin Rialachan Ginearalta maidir le Cosaint Sonrai (RGCS), ta smacht iomlain agat ar do shonrai pearsanta. Seo iad do chearta:
privacy.right_access_desc: Iarr coip de gach sonrai pearsanta ata againn fuit. Freagromid laistigh de 30 la.
privacy.right_rectification_desc: Ceartaigh aon fhaisneais phearsanta neamhchruinn no neamhiomlan ata againn fuit.
privacy.right_erasure_desc: Iarr do chuntas agus na sonrai pearsanta gaolmhara go leir a scriosadh.
privacy.right_portability_desc: Easpoidigh do shonrai i bhformat struchturrtha, inleite ag meaisin (JSON no CSV).
privacy.right_restrict_desc: Iarr go gcuirfeadh muid teorainn le conas a phroiseailimid do shonrai fad a bheitear ag reamhcheartu.
privacy.right_withdraw_desc: Tarraing siar toilithe le haghaidh proiseail shonrai roghnacha ag am ar bith gan difear a dheanamh do phroiseail roimhe.
privacy.rights_contact: Chun aon cheann de na cearta seo a fheidhmiu, dean teagmhail linn tri ar leathanach teagmhala. Freagromid gach iarratas laistigh de 30 la.
privacy.cookies_intro: Usaidimid fianain chun do thaithi ar ar n-ardan a fheabhsu:
privacy.cookie_essential_desc: Riachtanach le haghaidh logail isteach, slandala agus feidhmiiocht bhunusach an ardain. Ni feidir iad a dhichumasiu.
privacy.cookie_preference_desc: Cuimhnionn siad ar do shocruithe cosul le rogha teima, teanga agus roghanna taispeana.
privacy.cookie_analytics_desc: Cuidionn siad linn a thuiscint conas a usaideann daoine an t-ardan ionas gur feidir linn gneith a fheabhsu. Ta gach sonrai anaithe.
privacy.cookies_no_ads_after: fianain fograiochta agus ni roinntear sonrai le liontrai fograiochta. Is feidir leat roghanna fianain a bhainistiu i socruithe do bhrosalai. Le haghaidh tuilleadh sonrai, feach ar ar
privacy.retention_intro: Ni choinniomid do shonrai ach a fhad is ga:
privacy.retention_active_desc: Coinnitear sonrai fad a fhanann do chuntas gniomhach
privacy.retention_deleted_desc: Baintear sonrai pearsanta laistigh de 30 la tar eis an cuntas a scriosadh
privacy.retention_transactions_desc: D'fheadfai iad a choinneiail ar feadh suas le 7 mbliana chun crioch dli agus iniuchta
privacy.retention_logs_desc: Coinnitear seoltai IP agus logai rochtana ar feadh 12 mi
privacy.cta_body: Taimid anseo chun cabhru leat. Ma ta aon cheisteanna agat faoin bpolasai seo no ma theastaionn uait do chearta sonrai a fheidhmiu, na bith drogallach teagmhail a dheanamh linn.

cookies.heading: Polasai Fianain
cookies.subtitle: Conas a usaidimid fianain agus teicneolaiochtai comhchosuela ar ar n-ardan
cookies.what_are_body_1: Is comhaid bheaga teacs iad fianain a chuirtear ar do ghleo nuair a thugann tu cuairt ar shuiomh greasain. Usaidtear go forleathan iad chun suiomhanna greasain a obriu nios eifeachtai agus chun faisneais a sholathar d'unaeiri an tsuimh.
cookies.what_are_body_2: Usaideann {{name}} fianain agus teicneolaiochtai comhchosuela chun a chinntiiu go bhfaigheann tu an taithi is fearr ar ar n-ardan. Miniionn an polasai seo cen fianain a usaidimid, cen fath a usaidimid iad, agus conas is feidir leat iad a rialu.
cookies.cat_essential_desc: Ta na fianain seo go dian riachtanach chun go bhfeidhmeoidh an t-ardan. Cumasaionn siad feidhmiiocht larnach cosul le fiorasiu, slandail agus bainistiiocht seisiuin. Gan na fianain seo, ni feidir leis an ardan oibriu i gceart.
cookies.cat_analytics_desc: Cuidionn na fianain seo linn a thuiscint conas a idirghniomhaionn cuairteoiri leis an ardan tri fhaisneais a bhailiiu agus a thuairisciu go hanaithnid. Cuidionn se seo linn taithi an ardain a fheabhsu do gach duine.
cookies.cat_analytics_ex1: Leathanaigh ar tugadh cuairt orthu agus am a caitheadh
cookies.cat_preference_desc: Cuimhnionn na fianain seo ar do roghanna agus do shocruithe chun taithi nios pearsantaithe a sholathar. Ligeann siad don ardan cuimhneamh ar roghanna a dheanann tu cosul le teama, teanga agus roghanna taispeana.
cookies.no_marketing: Ni usaidimid fianain margaiochta na fograiochta. Ni roinntear do shonrai le fograioiri na liontrai fograiochta riamh.
cookies.cookie_session_purpose: Coinniionn do sheisiun fiorasithe ar fud ualai leathanaigh
cookies.cookie_csrf_purpose: Cosaint i gcoinne ionsaithe ealaithe iarratas trasiimh
cookies.cookie_token_purpose: Comhartha fiorasithe JWT le haghaidh iarratais API
cookies.cookie_refresh_purpose: Comhartha athnuachain le haghaidh athnuachan seisiuin gan uaim
cookies.cookie_locale_purpose: Stiorann rogha teanga agus formaid reigiunach
cookies.cookie_consent_purpose: Stiorann do roghanna toilithe fianain (catagoir glactha)
cookies.cookie_sentry_purpose: Rianaithe earraidi agus monatoriocht feidhmiiochta (le toiliiu anailisiochta amhain)
cookies.third_party_intro: I gcasanna airithe, usaidimid seirbhisi triiiu pairtithe a d'fheadfadh a gcuid fianain fein a shocriu. Airaitear orthu seo:
cookies.third_party_sentry_desc: Rianaithe earraidi agus monatoriocht feidhmiiochta (gniomhach le toiliiu anailisiochta amhain)
cookies.third_party_pusher_desc: Le haghaidh fograi fior-ama agus feidhmiiocht teachtaireachta
cookies.third_party_compliance: Roghnaimid ar bpairtneirti triiiu pairtiihe go curamach agus cinntiomid go gcloionn siad le rialachan cosanta sonrai infheidhmhe. Rialaionn polasai priobhaideachta an triiiu pairtiihe faoi seach na fianain triiiu pairtithe.
cookies.manage_intro: Is feidir leat fianain a rialu agus a bhainistiu ar bhealaí eagsula. Tabhair faoi deara le do thoil go bhfeadfadh fianain a bhaint no a bhloiceiil difear a dheanamh do do thaithi usaideoira agus b'fheidir nach mbeadh feidhmiiocht airithe ar fail a thuilleadh.
cookies.manage_warning: Cuirfidh fianain riiachtanacha a dhichumasiu cosc ort logail isteach agus gneith larnach an ardain a usaid. Molaimid fianain riiachtanacha a choinneail cumasithe.
cookies.browser_settings_intro: Ligeann formhor na mbrosalai greasain duit fianain a bhainistiu tri a socruithe. Seo an ait a bhfuil socruithe fianain i mbrosalai coitianta:
cookies.browser_chrome_path: Socruithe > Priobhaideacht agus slandail > Fianain agus sonrai suimh eile
cookies.browser_firefox_path: Socruithe > Priobhaideacht & Slandail > Fianain agus Sonrai Suimh
cookies.browser_safari_path: Roghanna > Priobhaideacht > Bainistigh Sonrai Suimh Greasain
cookies.browser_edge_path: Socruithe > Fianain agus ceadanna suimh > Fianain agus sonrai suimh
cookies.cta_body: Ma ta aon cheisteanna agat faoin usaid a bhainimid as fianain no faoin bpolasai seo, na bith drogallach teagmhail a dheanamh linn.

accessibility.heading: Raitis Inrochtaineachta
accessibility.subtitle: Ta {{name}} tiomanta d'inrochtaineacht dhigiteach a chinntiiu do dhaoine de gach cumas.
accessibility.commitment_body_1: Creidimid gur choir go mbeadh an t-idirlion inrochtana do gach duine, beag beann ar chumas no michumas. Deanann {{name}} iarracht a chinntiiu go gcompllioniann ar n-ardan no go suraileann se ceanglais na dTreoirlinte maidir le hInrochtaineacht Abhar Greasain (WCAG) 2.1 Leibheal AA.
accessibility.commitment_body_2: Taimid ag feabhsu na taithi usaideoiri do gach duine i gconai agus ag cur na gcaighdean inrochtaineachta cuio i bhfeidhm chun a chinntiiu go gcuirimid rochtain chothrom ar fail dar n-usaideoiri uile.
accessibility.feature_keyboard_desc: Tacaiocht iomlain mearclair lena n-airaitear naisc scipeala, tascairi focais agus ord taba loighciuil
accessibility.feature_visual_desc: Coibhneas codarsnachta iosmheanach 4.5:1, teacs in-athrutie, agus gan faisneais dath amhain
accessibility.feature_screen_reader_desc: HTML seimanteach, lipeid ARIA, agus teacs malartach fiuntach do gach iomha
accessibility.feature_responsive_desc: Oirinaionn an t-abhar do gach meid scaileain agus tacaioinn se le sumiial suas le 200% gan cailliunt feidhmiiochta
accessibility.conformance_body_1: Sainmhinionn na Treoirlinte maidir le hInrochtaineacht Abhar Greasain (WCAG) ceanglais do dhearadoiri agus d'fhorbroiri chun inrochtaineacht a fheabhsu do dhaoine faoi michumas. Sainmhinionn se tri leibheal comhliontachta: Leibheal A, Leibheal AA, agus Leibheal AAA.
accessibility.conformance_body_2_after: le WCAG 2.1 Leibheal AA. Ciallaiionn se seo go pairteiach comhliontach nach gcompllioniann codanna airithe den abhar go hiomlain leis an gcaighdean inrochtaineachta.
accessibility.feedback_intro: Cuirimid failte roimh d'aiseolas ar inrochtaineacht {{name}}. Cuir in iul duinn le do thoil ma bhuaileann tu le bacainni inrochtaineachta:
accessibility.feedback_email_desc: Usaid ar bhfoirm teagmhala chun fadhbanna a thuairisciu
accessibility.feedback_response_desc: Deanaimid iarracht freagra a thabhairt ar aiseolas inrochtaineachta laistigh de 5 la gno
accessibility.feedback_updates_desc: Cuirfimid ar an eolas thu faoin dul chun cinn i dtaobh an cheist a reiteach
accessibility.tech_intro: Braitheann inrochtaineacht {{name}} ar na teicneolaiochtai seo a leanas chun oibriu leis an meascin airithe de bhrosalai greasain agus aon teicneolaiochtai cunrthacha no breiseain ata suiteailte ar do riomhaire:
accessibility.tech_css: CSS le haghaidh cur i lathair amhairc
accessibility.tech_recommendation: Braitear ar na teicneolaiochtai seo le haghaidh comhliontachta leis na caighdeain inrochtaineachta a usaidtear. Molaimid an leagan is deanaiohe de do bhrosalai a usaid le teicneolaiocht chunta cothrom le data chun an taithi is fearr a fhail.
accessibility.last_updated: Nuashonraiodh an raitis seo go deireanach i bhFeabhra 2026.

hub.heading: Dli agus Comhliontacht
hub.subtitle: Ta tredhearcarcht agus muinin i gclar gach rud a dheanaimid. Anseo gheobhaidh tu ar gcaipeiisi dli agus polasaithe go leir.
hub.commitment_body_1: Ta {{name}} tiomanta go hiomlán do chomhliontacht RGCS agus dea-chleachtas cosanta sonrai. Creidimid go bhfuil se de cheart agat a thuiscint go cruinn conas a bhailiter, a phroiseailter agus a stoiraltar do chuid sonrai.
hub.commitment_body_2_before: Ta gach polasai thios scrofa i
hub.commitment_body_2_after: ionas go bhfuil se usaideach go firinneach, ni amhain riachtanach go dli. Ma ta aon rud doileir, ta ar bhfoireann sasta cabhru leat i gconai.
hub.doc_privacy_desc: Conas a bhailimid, a usaidimid agus a chosnaomid do chuid faisneise pearsanta. Airaitear do chearta RGCS agus polasaithe coinneala sonrai.
hub.doc_terms_desc: Na rialacha agus na treoirlinte a rialaionn d'usaid as an ardan, lena n-airaitear freagrachta ball agus caighdeain phobail.
hub.doc_cookies_desc: Sonrai faoi na fianain a usaidimid, cen fath a usaidimid iad agus conas is feidir leat do roghanna fianain a bhainistiu.
hub.doc_accessibility_desc: Ar dtiomantas chun an t-ardan a dheanamh inrochtana do gach duine, lena n-airaitear sonrai comhliontachta WCAG 2.1 AA.
hub.doc_community_guidelines_desc: Na caighdeain agus na hionchais maidir le rannphairtiocht mheasuil, thogalach inar bpobal.
hub.doc_acceptable_use_desc: Cad is usaid inghlactha agus toirmiscthe den ardan ann, lena n-airaitear rialacha inneachair agus iompair.
hub.cta_body: Ma ta aon cheisteanna agat faoinr gcaipeiisi dli, cleachtais sonrai, no ma theastaionn uait do chearta RGCS a fheidhmiu, dean teagmhail linn le do thoil.

version_history.heading: Stair Leaganacha
version_history.subtitle_generic: Leaganacha roimhe seo den chaipeis seo
version_history.no_versions: Ni bhfuarthas aon leaganacha foilsithe don chaipeis seo.

platform.cta_body: If you have questions about this platform-level document, contact the Project NEXUS team. For questions about your community's policies, contact {{tenant}} directly.

gate.consent_text: By clicking Accept, you confirm you have read and agree to the documents listed above.
